Interface IBreakpointStopCondition

All Superinterfaces:
StopCondition<Goal>
All Known Implementing Classes:
BreakpointStopCondition, SymbolicExecutionBreakpointStopCondition
public interface IBreakpointStopCondition extends StopCondition<Goal>
Defines the basic functionality of an StopCondition which stops applying rules when at least one IBreakpoint is hit.

    Method
